scripts.mailpit: docker compose -f onefive-back/docker-compose.yml up -d mailpit && echo '📬 Boîte de réception dev (emails + SMS) : http://localhost:8025'
scripts.mailpit:ensure: pnpm mailpit || echo '⚠️  Mailpit non démarré (Docker éteint ?) — les emails et SMS de dev échoueront. Relance-le avec: pnpm mailpit'
scripts.dev:web-stack: pnpm mailpit:ensure && pnpm --parallel --filter onefive-back --filter onefive-web run dev
scripts.dev:app-with-email: pnpm mailpit:ensure && pnpm --parallel --filter onefive-back --filter onefive-web --filter onefive-email run dev
scripts.dev:platform: pnpm mailpit:ensure && pnpm --parallel --filter onefive-back --filter onefive-web --filter onefive-backoffice run dev
scripts.dev:platform-with-email: pnpm mailpit:ensure && pnpm --parallel --filter onefive-back --filter onefive-web --filter onefive-backoffice --filter onefive-email run dev
scripts.dev:email-stack: pnpm mailpit:ensure && pnpm --parallel --filter onefive-email --filter onefive-email-transactional run dev
